acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Log files exceeding threshold (10MB) are automatically rotated
Old logs beyond specified generations (3) are deleted
Log rotation executes during server startup via scripts/build-and-start.sh --daemon
Rotation runs before nohup so it does not affect running server log writes
PRODUCTION_CHECKLIST.md Log rotation items are updated
Test procedures (basic, generation management, edge cases) all pass

notes: All 9 test scenarios passed.
